name: Cranberry Cinnamon Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute orange peel for lemon peel if desired.
2. Bring all ingredients except cranberries to room temperature.
3. Add the mixture to the machine in order. Set darkness control to 10 o'clock.
4. Select "white bread" and press Start.
5. Allow cranberries to thaw.
6. Add cranberries at the beep, approximately 88 minutes into the cycle.
7. Tested in DAK R2D2.
8. Sylvia's comments: very moist, tangy bread. For a different effect, add some cardamom and/or chopped nuts.
